offerings.name: A6
offerings.description: Hand-painted cover in ink and watercolour. Hand-stitched binding. 24 pages of paper made for fountain pens — no feathering, no bleed-through. Signed.

offerings.name: A5
offerings.description: Hand-painted cover in ink and watercolour. Hand-stitched binding. 24 pages of paper made for fountain pens — no feathering, no bleed-through. Signed.

faq.q: Can I suggest a subject, mood, or palette?
faq.a: Yes — tell me in the order note and I'll paint within your direction. If you'd rather I choose, I will.

faq.q: What kind of paper is inside?
faq.a: 24 pages of high-quality paper, chosen to take fountain pen ink without feathering or bleed-through. It holds watercolour washes too.
Usually around two weeks from order to ship, depending on the queue. I'll confirm your timeline in the first reply.
From Seoul. CJ Logistics within Korea, DHL everywhere else. Shipping quote confirmed before we finalise the order.
Each cover is stamped with the studio seal, and I can sign the inside cover on request.
